NAVAREA XIX 15/21
1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT 191830 UTC FEB 21 NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.
72-25.1N 020-08.4E TRANSOCEAN ENABLER
71-18.3N 022-18.5E SCARABEO 8
66-03.0N 008-10.0E TRANSOCEAN ENCOURAGE
65-55.1N 007-43.2E DEEPSEA NORDKAPP
NOTES: A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N. REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 12/21
